content.json:
# Google Cloud Platform Audit Logs

Unified monitoring and compliance insights for Google Cloud audit data ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| summarize TotalEvents = count()
content.title: Total Audit Events

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| summarize ['Unique Projects'] = dcount(ProjectNorm)
content.title: Projects Covered

content.title: Unique Principals

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| summarize ['High Severity Events'] = countif(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"))
content.title: High Severity Alerts

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), SeverityNorm
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Audit Events Over Time by Severity

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| summarize Events = count(), ['Projects Impacted'] = dcount(ProjectNorm), ['Distinct Principals'] = dcount(Principal) by ServiceNorm
| top 15 by Events desc
| order by Events desc
content.title: Top GCP Services & Methods

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| summarize Events = count(), ['High Severity'] = countif(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR")) by ProjectNorm, ResourceTypeNorm
| top 15 by Events desc
| order by Events desc
content.title: Projects & Resource Types with Highest Activity

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| where MethodNorm has_any ("SETIAMPOLICY", "SETPOLICY", "DELETE", "DISABLE", "MAKE", "REMOVE", "UPDATE")
| extend ['Risk Category'] = case(
    MethodNorm has "SETIAM", "IAM Policy Change",
    MethodNorm has "DELETE" or MethodNorm has "REMOVE", "Deletion",
    MethodNorm has "DISABLE", "Logging Disabled",
    MethodNorm has "MAKE" and MethodNorm has "PUBLIC", "Public Exposure",
    MethodNorm has "UPDATE", "Configuration Update",
    "Administrative Action")
| project ['Timestamp'] = TimeGenerated, ['Project'] = ProjectNorm, ['Service'] = ServiceNorm, ['Method'] = MethodNorm, ['Risk Category'], ['Principal'] = Principal, ['Severity'] = SeverityNorm, ['Status Code'] = StatusCode, ['Status Detail'] = StatusDetail, ['Caller IP'] = CallerIp, ['Resource Type'] = ResourceTypeNorm, ['Source File'] = SourceFile
| order by ['Timestamp'] desc
| take 100
content.title: Privileged & Configuration-Changing Operations (Top 100)

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| where StatusCode !in ("", "0", "200") or SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR")
| project ['Timestamp'] = TimeGenerated, ['Project'] = ProjectNorm, ['Service'] = ServiceNorm, ['Method'] = MethodNorm, ['Principal'] = Principal, ['Severity'] = SeverityNorm, ['Status Code'] = StatusCode, ['Status Detail'] = StatusDetail, ['Caller IP'] = CallerIp, ['Resource Type'] = ResourceTypeNorm, ['Source File'] = SourceFile
| order by ['Timestamp'] desc
| take 100
content.title: Failed or High-Severity Operations

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| where LocationNorm != "Unknown"
| summarize Events = count(), ['Unique Principals'] = dcount(Principal) by LocationNorm
| top 15 by Events desc
content.title: Top GCP Regions / Locations

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
      | extend CallerIp = coalesce(
        tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp),
        tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip)
    )
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| where CallerIp != "Unknown"
| summarize Events = count(), ['Distinct Services'] = dcount(ServiceNorm), ['Distinct Projects'] = dcount(ProjectNorm) by CallerIp
| top 20 by Events desc
content.title: Top Caller IPs

content.query:
let Base =
    GCPAuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | extend Principal = coalesce(iff(isempty(PrincipalEmail), tostring(AuthenticationInfo.principalEmail), PrincipalEmail), "Unknown")
    | extend StatusCode = tostring(Status.code)
    | extend StatusDetail = coalesce(StatusMessage, tostring(Status.message))
    | extend ResourceTypeNorm = case(isempty(tostring(GCPResourceType)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.type)), tostring(GCPResourceType))
    | extend LocationNorm = case(isempty(tostring(ResourceLocation)), case(isempty(tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), "Unknown", tostring(ResourceOriginalState.location)), tostring(ResourceLocation))
    | extend SeverityNorm = case(isempty(Severity), "UNKNOWN", toupper(Severity))
    | extend ProjectNorm = case(isempty(ProjectId), "Unknown", ProjectId)
    | extend ServiceNorm = case(isempty(ServiceName), "Unknown", ServiceName)
    | extend MethodNorm = case(isempty(MethodName), "Unknown", MethodName)
    | extend CallerIp = coalesce(tostring(RequestMetadata.callerIp), tostring(RequestMetadata.requestAttributes.ip))
    | extend CallerIp = case(isempty(CallerIp), "Unknown", CallerIp)
    | extend StatusCategory = case(SeverityNorm in ("CRITICAL", "ALERT", "ERROR"), "High", SeverityNorm == "WARNING", "Medium", "Informational")
;
Base
| project ['Timestamp'] = TimeGenerated, ['Project'] = ProjectNorm, ['Service'] = ServiceNorm, ['Method'] = MethodNorm, ['Principal'] = Principal, ['Severity'] = SeverityNorm, ['Status Code'] = StatusCode, ['Status Detail'] = StatusDetail, ['Resource Type'] = ResourceTypeNorm, ['Location'] = LocationNorm, ['Log Name'] = LogName, ['Source File'] = SourceFile, AuthenticationInfo, AuthorizationInfo, RequestMetadata, Request, Response, ServiceData
| order by ['Timestamp'] desc
| take 200
content.title: Latest 200 Audit Records (Pivot-Friendly)
